# Vendored Runtime Assets

These files are bundled for offline prototype execution:

- `react.production.min.js` — React 18.3.1 UMD production build, MIT License, source URL: `https://unpkg.com/react@18.3.1/umd/react.production.min.js`
- `react-dom.production.min.js` — ReactDOM 18.3.1 UMD production build, MIT License, source URL: `https://unpkg.com/react-dom@18.3.1/umd/react-dom.production.min.js`
- `babel.min.js` — Babel standalone 7.29.0, MIT License, source URL: `https://unpkg.com/@babel/standalone@7.29.0/babel.min.js`

They are loaded from `assets/vendor/` by the local demo bundle so the prototype can run without CDN access.
